---
title: "update_sst_ssta_monthly.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../crw.html)

Builds one monthly combined CRW SST/SSTA NetCDF product.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/crw/scripts/update_sst_ssta_monthly.py >}}
```

:::
